findings.rationale: BSEG is RESTRUCTURED in S/4HANA; read line items via the released CDS view I_JournalEntryItem (over the Universal Journal ACDOCA), not the raw table. Field renames: BUKRS->RBUKRS, HKONT->RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN.
findings.intent_question: Does this read need full BSEG line-item granularity or is the ACDOCA/I_JournalEntryItem target sufficient? Confirm ledger (RLDNR).
